name: Gold Orogen Resources Corp.
description: Gold Orogen Resources Corp. is an early-stage gold exploration company listed on the Canadian Securities Exchange, formed through a reverse takeover of Great Republic Mining and commencing trading on February 11, 2026. The company holds gold exploration assets in two highly prospective Canadian mineral belts: the Golden Culvert/WIN property on the Tombstone Belt in the Yukon (with over 4,500 metres drilled), and the McIntyre Brook and Riley Brook properties in New Brunswick, where a 19.9% strategic partner JV covers 445 km² of mineral rights. Gold Orogen is a pure-play explorer with no current mineral production.
